form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Nowra over 630m. Last start finished 4th over 622m at Richmond beaten 7 lengths (35.88) behind Joanne in a Grade 5 on March 27. Has been around the mark at his last couple and should make his presence felt.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Nowra over 630m. Last start finished 4th over 622m at Richmond beaten 7 lengths (35.88) behind Joanne in a Grade 5 on March 27. Has been around the mark at his last couple and should make his presence felt.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start hampered and came together, losing momentum.
Shifted out at first turn and came into contact.

form.formComment: Quickly away at this track two runs back then again settled forward and finished second at Maitland last start over 450m from this same draw. Close to the speed and boxed on well at the latest run. Key chance again.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by a neck at Goulburn over 350m (19.74) beating Irinka Alana in Grade 5 on March 20. The last run is a strong form reference. Follow up.

form.formComment: Goes well at this track and trip. Last start finished 4th over 440m at Goulburn beaten 5 lengths (25.45) behind How High in a Grade 5 on March 27. Solid showing expected.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fifth but before that won by 1.5 lengths at this track (29.80) beating Elle's Moon in a Grade 5 on March 7. Prepared to just watch this time.

form.formComment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 2.25 lengths second at Temora but did record an exceptional 25.60 over the 457m journey. Can sneak a place again.
